Description:
Set up the monorepo root with Docker multi-stage build, Nginx reverse proxy, Supervisor process config, and local dev orchestration.

SCOPE: MVP 1
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure / DevOps
STORIES: 1.1 - 1.6

Create the job-discovery/ root directory with required base files.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Create AGENT.md as root index (lightweight, references child files only)
- Create .env.example documenting all required env vars with empty values
- Create .gitignore covering node_modules, .env, __pycache__, .next, out, .uv
- Create root README.md with project overview and quickstart

EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure
DEPENDENCIES: None

TESTING CRITERIA:
- All files present at repo root
- .gitignore covers all generated artefacts
- .env.example lists every variable used across the stack

EDGE CASES:
- Ensure no secrets committed even accidentally

Build the multi-stage Dockerfile combining Next.js static export with Python FastAPI runtime.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Stage 1: node:22-alpine — npm ci + next build → produces /app/frontend/out
- Stage 2: python:3.14-slim — install nginx, supervisor, curl via apt-get
- Install uv via curl install script; set PATH
- Copy backend/pyproject.toml; run uv sync --no-dev
- Copy backend source; run playwright install chromium --with-deps
- Copy frontend /out to /var/www/html
- Copy nginx.conf and supervisord.conf
- EXPOSE 80; CMD supervisord

EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure
DEPENDENCIES: JD-1

TESTING CRITERIA:
- docker build completes without errors
- Container starts and serves frontend on port 80
- /api/v1/ routes proxied to FastAPI correctly
- /health endpoint returns 200

EDGE CASES:
- Playwright Chromium install may fail on slim image — ensure --with-deps flag
- uv PATH must be set before any uv commands

Create supervisord.conf to manage process start order: migrate → nginx → fastapi.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- [program:migrate] — uv run alembic upgrade head; priority=1; autorestart=false
- [program:nginx] — /usr/sbin/nginx -g daemon off; priority=10; autorestart=true
- [program:fastapi] — uv run uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --workers 2; priority=10
- All programs log to stdout/stderr with maxbytes=0
- nodaemon=true at supervisord level

EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure
DEPENDENCIES: JD-2

TESTING CRITERIA:
- supervisord starts all three programs
- migrate exits cleanly before nginx and fastapi start
- nginx and fastapi restart on failure

EDGE CASES:
- migrate failure must not prevent nginx/fastapi from starting (configure startsecs correctly)

Create nginx.conf routing / to static export and /api/v1/* to FastAPI.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- events {} block required
- http > server listens on port 80
- location / — root /var/www/html; index index.html; try_files $uri $uri/ $uri.html /index.html
- location /api/ — proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8000; proxy_http_version 1.1; set Host, X-Real-IP, X-Forwarded-For headers; proxy_read_timeout 120s
- location /health — proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8000/health
- include /etc/nginx/mime.types; default_type application/octet-stream

EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure
DEPENDENCIES: JD-3

TESTING CRITERIA:
- Static assets served with correct MIME types
- API calls proxied without 502 errors
- Health check endpoint reachable

EDGE CASES:
- trailingSlash: true in next.config.ts required for try_files to resolve routes

Create docker-compose.yml for local development orchestration.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- version: 3.9
- services.app: build context=. dockerfile=Dockerfile
- ports: 80:80
- env_file: .env
- restart: unless-stopped
- healthcheck: curl -f http://localhost/health; interval 30s; timeout 10s; retries 3

EFFORT: S (1 hour)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure
DEPENDENCIES: JD-4

TESTING CRITERIA:
- docker-compose up starts cleanly
- App accessible at http://localhost
- Health check passes within 90 seconds

EDGE CASES:
- Port 80 may be in use locally — document alternative port in README

Create tasks/ directory at monorepo root with todo.md and lessons.md workflow files.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Create docs/tasks/todo.md with Active Plan header, checkable steps template, and Review section
- Create docs/tasks/lessons.md with session date header, mistake pattern, root cause, and prevention rule columns
- Update root AGENT.md index to include tasks/ directory entry
- Add docs/tasks/ to .gitignore exclusions? No — track in version control

EFFORT: S (1 hour)
PROJECT AREA: Workflow
DEPENDENCIES: JD-1

TESTING CRITERIA:
- docs/tasks/todo.md exists and follows template structure
- docs/tasks/lessons.md exists and follows template structure
- Root AGENT.md references both files

EDGE CASES:
- Files must not be empty — include placeholder content so CI check passes

Establish AI-agent workflow management files and CI enforcement to ensure plan-before-implement discipline across all sessions.

SCOPE: MVP 1
PROJECT AREA: Workflow / Process
STORIES: 16.1 - 16.6

Create docs/tasks/todo.md with the correct structure for AI-agent task tracking.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Header: ## Active Plan — [Task Name] [Date]
- Checklist section: - [ ] Step description (one per implementation step)
- Review section appended on completion: ## Review — what was built, what was skipped, what changed
- Add note: this file is written BEFORE any implementation begins

EFFORT: XS (30 min)
PROJECT AREA: Workflow
DEPENDENCIES: None

TESTING CRITERIA:
- File exists at docs/tasks/todo.md
- Structure matches template exactly
- CI check-workflow-docs step can find the file

EDGE CASES:
- File must not be auto-generated — must be human/agent writable

Create docs/tasks/lessons.md for self-improvement logging after every user correction.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Header: ## Lessons — [Session Date]
- Each entry: Mistake pattern | Root cause | Rule to prevent recurrence
- Format as markdown table for easy scanning
- Pre-populate with one example row to demonstrate structure

EFFORT: XS (30 min)
PROJECT AREA: Workflow
DEPENDENCIES: None

TESTING CRITERIA:
- File exists at docs/tasks/lessons.md
- Table structure correct
- CI check can find the file

EDGE CASES:
- Must be updated immediately after any user correction — include this as a note in the file header

Update root AGENT.md to include Workflow Rules table and expanded Where-to-look index.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Add ## Workflow Rules section with table: Plan mode | Task log | Verify plan | Subagents | Lessons review | Correction loop | Done gate | Elegance check | Bug reports
- Add docs/tasks/todo.md and docs/tasks/lessons.md rows to Where to look index table
- Keep file as index only — no standards content inline

EFFORT: S (1 hour)
PROJECT AREA: Workflow
DEPENDENCIES: JD-7, JD-8

TESTING CRITERIA:
- All 9 workflow rules present in table
- Both tasks/ files listed in index
- File remains under 100 lines

EDGE CASES:
- Do not duplicate content from child AGENT.md files

Update docs/EXECUTION-RULES.md to include Workflow Execution Rules with MUST and MUST NOT lists.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- MUST list: plan mode for 3+ step tasks, write todo.md before implementation, check in before building, read lessons.md at session start, capture corrections in lessons.md, mark steps done incrementally with evidence, verify before marking complete, pause for elegance check on non-trivial changes, fix bugs autonomously
- MUST NOT list: implement before plan confirmed, mark done without evidence, apply hacky fixes, edit out-of-scope files, repeat documented mistakes
- Place section after existing Final Execution Rules

EFFORT: S (1 hour)
PROJECT AREA: Workflow
DEPENDENCIES: None

TESTING CRITERIA:
- Both MUST and MUST NOT lists complete
- Rules non-overlapping and actionable

EDGE CASES:
- Ensure rules are agent-readable (imperative, unambiguous)

Update backend/agents/AGENT.md to add Subagent Execution Rules section.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Rule: one task per subagent invocation
- Offload strategy: research tasks, exploration tasks, parallel analysis, eval runs
- Context window discipline: reserve 20% for output; summarise inputs before passing to subagent
- Result summarisation protocol: subagent returns structured summary not raw output
- Escalation: if subagent fails twice, escalate to parent agent with error context

EFFORT: S (1 hour)
PROJECT AREA: Backend / Workflow
DEPENDENCIES: None

TESTING CRITERIA:
- Section added without removing existing cross-agent rules
- Rules consistent with root AGENT.md workflow rules

EDGE CASES:
- Must not conflict with existing DIFA/ReAct loop rules

Add check-workflow-docs step to .github/workflows/ci.yml that fails if docs/tasks/todo.md or docs/tasks/lessons.md is missing.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Add job step after checkout: name: Check workflow docs
- Run: test -f docs/tasks/todo.md && test -f docs/tasks/lessons.md
- If either file missing: exit 1 with descriptive error message
- Step runs on every PR and push to main

EFFORT: XS (30 min)
PROJECT AREA: CI/CD
DEPENDENCIES: JD-7, JD-8

TESTING CRITERIA:
- CI fails when docs/tasks/todo.md is deleted
- CI fails when docs/tasks/lessons.md is deleted
- CI passes when both files exist

EDGE CASES:
- Files must contain content — add wc -l check to catch empty files
